member.name: T:WorkNest.API.Configurations.CorsConfig
member.summary: CORS configuration — reads allowed origins from appsettings.json Cors:AllowedOrigins.

member.name: M:WorkNest.API.Configurations.CorsConfig.UseCorsWithConfig(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Applies the CORS policy with origins read from configuration at startup. Call this after builder.Build() to access IConfiguration from the app.

member.name: T:WorkNest.API.Configurations.SwaggerConfig
member.summary: Swagger/OpenAPI configuration with JWT bearer authentication support.

member.name: T:WorkNest.API.Middleware.ExceptionMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception middleware. Catches all unhandled exceptions, logs them via Serilog, and returns a standardized ApiResponse JSON — never exposes stack traces.

member.name: T:WorkNest.API.Middleware.RequestLoggingMiddleware
member.summary: Logs every incoming request and outgoing response using Serilog.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
